alert.regulatory_reference: MLPPA 2022, Section 2 — mandatory NFIU reporting for cash transactions exceeding ₦5,000,000 (individuals) / ₦10,000,000 (corporates)
alert.legal_consequence: Failure to file mandatory report within 7 days: ₦250,000–₦1,000,000/day fine
alert.recommended_action: Escalate to MLRO. File STR with NFIU within 7 days.
